objective: Complete post-access investigation as ben. Map full local attack surface for privilege escalation.

high_value_findings.title: /usr/bin/bash is world-writable (mode 0777)
high_value_findings.impact: Any user can replace bash binary. If root executes bash, attacker payload runs as root.
high_value_findings.notes: Real bash still installed (md5 matches /tmp/bash_orig). Wrapper payload at /tmp/bash_wrapper ready to deploy.

high_value_findings.title: Arcane Docker Management supports X-API-Key auth
high_value_findings.evidence: X-API-Key header returns 'invalid API key' instead of 'auth required'
high_value_findings.impact: Valid API key grants full Docker management as root

high_value_findings.title: alice is in docker group
high_value_findings.impact: alice can run containers with host root mount = root

high_value_findings.title: PrivateBin TLS private key readable
high_value_findings.impact: MITM potential on all 3 HTTPS vhosts

high_value_findings.title: Arcane ENCRYPTION_KEY exposed in systemd unit
high_value_findings.impact: Used for data encryption. May be related to JWT secret derivation in v1.13.0.

privesc_leads.evidence: /usr/bin/bash is 0777. Wrapper at /tmp/bash_wrapper creates SUID copy. /tmp/bash_orig is real bash backup.
privesc_leads.blocker: No known mechanism triggers root to execute /usr/bin/bash. All cron scripts use /bin/sh (dash). No systemd services reference bash.
next_steps: Investigate root's crontab (not readable as ben)
Research if Arcane Go binary spawns bash for container exec
Check if Docker operations trigger bash
Deploy wrapper and monitor for SUID creation

privesc_leads.path: Arcane API auth -> Docker container escape
privesc_leads.evidence: POST /api/auth/login works (rejects bad creds). X-API-Key header supported. Full Docker management via frontend.
privesc_leads.blocker: No valid credentials found. admin/admin, ENCRYPTION_KEY as password/API-key all rejected.
next_steps: Search for API keys or passwords in PrivateBin paste content
Research Arcane v1.13.0 default credentials or JWT derivation
Download and analyze full JS bundle for hidden API endpoints
Try to brute common passwords for admin user

privesc_leads.evidence: alice in docker group (gid=111) and operator group (gid=37). Home dir mode 700, not readable.
privesc_leads.blocker: No alice credentials found. Home directory inaccessible.
next_steps: Check PrivateBin pastes for alice credentials
Check Arcane user database for alice account
Credential reuse from any discovered password

privesc_leads.evidence: Paste dirs /privatebin-data/data/12/ and /4e/ exist but mode 700 nobody:82
privesc_leads.blocker: Cannot read paste content as ben. Need container-level access.
next_steps: Find way to trigger webshell in salt.php inside container
Read paste content via Arcane if we get Docker access

credentials_and_secrets.context: Used by nginx for all 3 HTTPS vhosts

misconfigurations.impact: Can write files into container data volume

anomalies: Pre-staged privesc artifacts in /tmp/ (bash_wrapper, bash_orig, test.php, base_procs)
Port 38963 — unidentified Go HTTP service on localhost
PrivateBin bd/b5/ contains PHP files and symlink placed by ben in prior session
No obvious trigger for root to execute /usr/bin/bash despite it being the apparent intended vector
oracle_flags: Find the bash trigger — what makes root execute /usr/bin/bash?
Crack Arcane auth — try password spray, research v1.13.0 JWT derivation from ENCRYPTION_KEY
Get alice credentials — check PrivateBin pastes, Arcane user database
Identify port 38963 — may expose additional API surface
PrivateBin paste content locked — need container access to read dirs 12/ and 4e/
